build_system: MetaTrader 5 compiler (not available in sandbox - no compilation possible)
test_framework: None (MT5 EAs are tested in MetaTrader Strategy Tester, not available here)
build_command: N/A - MQL5 files compiled by MetaTrader IDE
test_command: N/A - syntax validation only via code review
verification_instructions: Verify that the .mq5 file is syntactically valid MQL5 by reviewing structure, includes, function signatures. No compilation available.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - this is a single-file greenfield MQL5 EA creation
environment_constraints: No MQL5 compiler available. Validation is limited to code review and structural checks.
contribution_requirements: Single .mq5 file, match code style of GaganEA_v3.mq5
key_patterns: From GaganEA_v3.mq5: CTrade and CPositionInfo from Trade includes, input groups with === delimiters, dashboard with ObjLbl/ObjRect/ObjLine helpers, NormLot helper, pip calculation using digits check, ArraySetAsSeries for buffers, position/order iteration by magic number, TicketInArr array helpers, partial close via trade.PositionClosePartial()
relevant_files: /projects/sandbox/Claude/GaganEA_v3.mq5 (reference for code style, dashboard, lot calculation, position management patterns)
directory_structure: Flat repository - all EA .mq5 files at root level. Target: /projects/sandbox/Claude/GagansModel_EA.mq5
